---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

## Pulakesh Pradhan
**Geographer | GIS Specialist | Spatial Data Scientist**  
📧 [pulakesh.mid@gmail.com](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com)  
📞 [+91 8617812861](tel:+918617812861)  
🏠 Department of Geography, Ravenshaw University

---

## Education
- **Department of Geography**, Ravenshaw University
- **Specialization:** GIS, Remote Sensing, Google Earth Engine

## Technical Skills
- **Languages:** Python, R, JavaScript, SQL
- **GIS Platforms:** Google Earth Engine (Expert), ArcGIS Pro, QGIS
- **Data Science:** Geospatial AI, Deep Learning, Phenology Analysis
- **Tools:** LaTeX, Git/GitHub, Chrome Extension Development

## Academic Highlights
- **Resource Person:** Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University (Sept. 2025)
- **Resource Person:** Centurion University (March 2025)
- **YouTube Creator:** "Spatial Geography" channel (Tutorials on GEE, Python, R)

---

[View PDF Version of CV](#) (Coming Soon)
